title: Seeking a Monday.com specialist for initial setup from Trello
excerpt: On behalf of Ferla Technology, we are seeking a Monday.com expert who can assist in the initial setup of our workspaces, boards, automations and provide guidance on Monday.com best practices! We currently use Trello and …

posts.author: ninaurealopez (Nina Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml:
On behalf of Ferla Technology, we are seeking a Monday.com expert who can assist in the initial setup of our workspaces, boards, automations and provide guidance on Monday.com best practices! We currently use Trello and need our projects and tasks to be transferred over as well. (We are a small but mighty team of 5 people).

Please contact me at nina@ferlabikes.com for inquiries.

Thank you in advance!!

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ninaurealopez

upstream can help. We are Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners and APAC Partner of the Year for 2020. Based in Australia, we have a global staff network encompassing dedicated teams.

You’ll have access to our Solutions Engineers as well as our full stack Development Team who specialise in integrations and custom requirements.

Please feel free to return my email directly via peta@upstreamtech.io alternatively you can book straight into my calendar for a meeting using the below link. I would be very interested to understand your use case and see how we can help you.

Meet with Peta

Kind regards,
Peta - upstream

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ninaurealopez

Welcome to the community! You are in the right place to find someone! My name is Elena and I’m the founder of Kick Consulting. I worked with monday.com for over 4 years and have a team of 14 working along side of me (project/change managers, implementation specialists, developers).

We specialise in helping growing and innovative businesses, like yours, create a solid foundation and structure before they expand. This creates a solid base for the expansion.

We prefer to work with clients who are contributing to the betterment of the world. We would love to work with Ferla Bikes, I love what you guys are doing!

We set up monday.com and help businesses get the most out of their setup.

We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to discuss your pinpoints, needs, possible steps forward and options. You can book a session through this link . If you are unable to find suitable time, please let me know and I will contact you with more availability.

I look forward to hearing from you.

Elena
Kick Consulting

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @ninaurealopez

Welcome to the monday .com community!

Our steadfast team of monday.com experts can help your enterprise with the initial setup of boards, workflows, and automation in monday com. This way your company can standardize processes and overcome workflow challenges through an optimized structure. With rich expertise in integrations, our monday .com experts can help transfer projects, tasks, and workflow from your Trello account to monday dot com. By performing monday Trello integration, our experts can bridge the gap between those two platforms and promote better transparency and collaboration for your team.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
